description: SEON provides fraud prevention and AML compliance software with real-time data enrichment, risk scoring, and investigation workflows. Its platform is used to assess user, payment, identity, and transaction risk.
summary: SEON exposes a documented HTTP API and a documented MCP server; public docs were found, but this crawl could not reliably extract machine-readable specs, endpoint URLs, or authentication mechanics from the JS/cookie-gated pages.
